strategy_summary: Oils in the titan arum plant are volatilized to release its unique scent by raising the internal temperature. “To produce its perfume, the plant [titan arum] raises its internal temperature several degrees above that of its surroundings and vaporises oils secreted in its heart.” (Attenborough 1995:140)
mechanism:
Oils in the titan arum plant are volatilized to release its unique scent by raising the internal temperature.

“To produce its perfume, the plant [titan arum] raises its internal temperature several degrees above that of its surroundings and vaporises oils secreted in its heart.” (Attenborough 1995:140)
